sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42880" key="e)sdramu/licon" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐσδραμύλιξον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἴσδραμε,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐσδύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n42880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐκδύω</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
